steps.title: Graph circle A and read the intercept
steps.content: A fast Desmos check is to graph circle A, $(x+8)^2+(y-8)^2=64$. The circle has center $(-8,8)$ and radius $8$, so it is tangent to the x-axis at $(-8,0)$. Therefore $(r,s)=(-8,0)$.

steps.title: Reject the wrong centers
steps.content: Circle B has the same radius as circle A, so its radius is $8$, but its center is the x-intercept $(-8,0)$. Graph the choices with the wrong centers first: A has center $(0,-8)$, B has center $(0,8)$, and D has center $(8,0)$.

steps.title: Confirm the matching circle
steps.content: Choice C, $(x+8)^2+y^2=64$, has center $(-8,0)$ and radius $8$. That is exactly the circle centered at the x-intercept of circle A.

steps.title: Eliminate the answer choices
steps.content:
• A) $x^2+(y+8)^2=64$: center $(0,-8)$, not $(-8,0)$.
  • B) $x^2+(y-8)^2=64$: center $(0,8)$, not $(-8,0)$.
  • C) $(x+8)^2+y^2=64$: center $(-8,0)$, radius $8$. Matches.
  • D) $(x-8)^2+y^2=64$: center $(8,0)$, not $(-8,0)$.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
